name: developer-tool-workspace
description: App Store Connect API synchronization tool workspace
//: WORKSPACES!!! NOTE THAT ORDER MATTERS, BASE PACKAGES NEED TO BE FIRST

scripts.dev: npm run build && concurrently "npm run build:watch --workspace=shared" "EXPRESS_PORT=3000 nodemon --exec 'npm run dev --workspace=api' --watch api/src --ext ts,js --ignore 'api/dist/**'" "npm run build:watch --workspace=cli" "PORT=3001 npm run dev --workspace=web"
scripts.dev:noweb: npm run build:noweb && concurrently "npm run build:watch --workspace=shared" "EXPRESS_PORT=3000 nodemon --exec 'npm run dev --workspace=api' --watch api/src --ext ts,js --ignore 'api/dist/**'" "npm run build:watch --workspace=cli"
scripts.publish:cli: npm run build && npm run upload-sourcemap --workspace=cli && npm publish --workspace=cli
scripts.link:cli: npm run build --workspace=cli && cd cli && npm link
